name: bryanmichael-hue/yearbook-mcp-public
description: e-yearbook.com archive search — over 300K U.S. yearbooks and over 100M person mentions (high school, college, military). Free preview returns coarsened state + decade; subscription unlocks school name, exact year, page numbers, and scan images. Streamable HTTP at `mcp.digitaldataonline.com/mcp`, bearer auth, paste-and-go token at /for-ai-agents/. Registry: `com.digitaldataonline.mcp/e-yearbook`.
